pluginJinaDescription: Converts any URL into LLM-friendly markdown content. Useful for reading documentation, articles, or any webpage context.
pluginWeatherDescription: Get real-time weather information including temperature, conditions, and humidity for any city.
pluginUnsplashDescription: Search for high-quality photos on Unsplash.
pluginAgnesImageDescription: Generate or edit images with Agnes Image 2.1 Flash from text prompts or input images.
pluginGeminiImageDescription: Generate or edit images with Gemini Nano Banana image models.
pluginOpenAIImageDescription: Generate or edit images with OpenAI-compatible Images API providers.
pluginOpenAIResponsesImageDescription: Generate or edit images with the OpenAI Responses API image_generation tool.
pluginAgnesVideoDescription: Create text-to-video or image-to-video tasks with Agnes Video V2.0, then retrieve generated results.
